title: GasCityDomainCommandRequested v1
description: Domain-addressed request for an allowlisted deterministic domain action; the city never mutates protected domain state directly. FLAT detail (no cross-city envelope): published with the domain event source and this object as the EventBridge detail. The domain bridge's deny-by-default command router validates, executes, and (when reply is present) answers with a GasCityDomainCommandTerminal.v1 envelope event addressed back to reply.target_city with payload.route=reply.route. Published only by the domain-handoff domain-command-publish order from an open domain_command_request bead, which stays open as the durable waiter until domain-command-reconcile closes it. Contract version 1.1.
